markdownRemark.html:
How can you market your content to get people interested?

  • Give away something of value as an incentive to sign up for something (like newsletter)

  • Examples:

    • Free music
    • Graphic design
    • Ebooks
    • Podcasts
    • Videos
    • Tutorials
    • Lists of top tips

Who is your target audience?

  • Tell a story about your people: who are they?

    • Give them a face and a name
    • Example:

    • For FirstFruits Analytics, the people I'm trying to reach are:

      • People (business starters) who want to give their life to something bigger than them and want their business to support them
      • People (business owners) who want to break out of the rat race and focus on their personal and family life
    • Questions about audience
    • Where do they meet?
    • Have they spent money on this in the past?
    • Is there anything that would prevent them from having this?
    • What's the half life of the info?

Promotion

  • How do you build attention, traffic, and sales?
  • PR is the art of asking, sharing your work, building your audience, making pitches and connecting to journalists

  • Framework for promotion

    • Website
    • Incentive for email list
    • Autoresponder
    • Publish work on other people's sites

  • Resources

    • How to pitch the press (Forbes)
    • How to pitch to journalists (BuzzSumo)
    • Pitch perfect (The next web)
    • The art of asking (Medium)

  • Promotion Ideas

    • Add link to bottom of email with next projects
    • Blog interviews
    • Printed mail
    • Use VA for social media
    • HARO - respond to reporters everyday for 2 weeks
    • Client testimonies
    • Offer to speak for free
    • Feature interviews or profiles
